citations.desc: Access and inspection of records and property; submission of itineraries.
citations.narrative:
A responsible adult was not available to accompany APHIS Officials during the inspection process at 12:28 pm on March
19, 2026. The inspector reached the licensee by phone at 12:28 pm and the licensee stated that they were out of town
and there was no person available for inspection. Inspector departure from premise at 12:58 pm.
Failure to provide access to the facility, animals, and records for inspection is a violation of the AWA and regulations.
Continued failure to provide access is serious and may result in enforcement action.
End Section

narrative:
2.126(b) 
   
Access and inspection of records and property; submission of itineraries. 
A responsible adult was not available to accompany APHIS Officials during the inspection process at 12:28 pm on March 
19, 2026. The inspector reached the licensee by phone at 12:28 pm and the licensee stated that they were out of town 
and there was no person available for inspection. Inspector departure from premise at 12:58 pm. 
 Failure to provide access to the facility, animals, and records for inspection is a violation of the AWA and regulations. 
Continued failure to provide access is serious and may result in enforcement action. 
 
 
End Section
